job_summary: An Infectious Disease CRA monitors trials related to infections such as HIV, tuberculosis, influenza, and emerging diseases like COVID-19.
key_responsibilities: Ensure biosafety and infection control protocols
Verify laboratory data (viral load, cultures, PCR results)
Track adverse events and disease progression
skills: Knowledge of microbiology and infectious diseases
career_path: Infectious Disease CRA → Global Health CRA → Program Manager
skills_required: ensure biosafety and infection control protocols
knowledge of microbiology and infectious diseases
track adverse events and disease progression
verify laboratory data (viral load, cultures, pcr results)
